---
title: "不動産データ統計解析レポート"
author: "sugarfree-hash"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE}
# 1.ライブラリ
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(ggplot2)

# 2. データの読み込み
con <- dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), "real_estate.db")
mydata <- dbReadTable(con, "houseprice")
dbDisconnect(con)

# 3. 分析
model <- lm(rent ~ age + distance + layout, data = mydata)
summary(model)

# 4. グラフ表示
ggplot(mydata, aes(x = age, y = rent)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  theme_minimal()
```
